title: oberonia bicornis
intro: Oberonia bicornis, also known as the two-horned orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Oberonia bicornis include its potential to aid in the treatment of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Oberonia bicornis are typically made by infusing the plant's flowers and leaves in water, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical application.
